item.title: OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min Chris Dobey bulldozed his way to a second Players Championship title in 2026 with an 8-4 t
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min Chris Dobey bulldozed his way to a second Players Championship title in 2026 with an 8-4 triumph over Justin Hood in a remarkable Event Nine final on Monday in Wigan.
http:// bit.ly/DobeyPC9 1 24 7 mil

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7min Stephen Maguire won't be at the Crucible for the second year on the bounce. Three of the l
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7min Stephen Maguire won't be at the Crucible for the second year on the bounce. Three of the last four he's missed. Blow to his ranking as he made the quarters in 2024.
Great 10-5 win for Liam Highfield. He's got Oli Lines or Ben Woollaston on Wednesday. 1 3 295

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 14min THE CAPTAIN IS INTO JUDGEMENT DAY!
Ali Carter turned on the gas in the evening session to claim
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 14min THE CAPTAIN IS INTO JUDGEMENT DAY!
Ali Carter turned on the gas in the evening session to claim a 10-5 win over Julien Leclerq.
#WCQ 2 5 25 2 mil
